_comment: Jurisdiction-mean coral cover from public NCRMP (NOAA) and AGRRA reports. Built by scripts/fetch-coral-cover.mjs. Each entry cites a published source. Each locationId in the `appliesTo` list inherits this snapshot. lastReviewedAt is when the citation was last verified by hand.

jurisdictions.label: Florida Keys (NCRMP)
jurisdictions.method: Stratified random benthic transects across NCRMP Florida domain (fore-reef + patch reef sites)
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: NOAA NCRMP Florida benthic 2022 status report
jurisdictions.notes: Florida Reef Tract has been at historically low cover since the late-1990s white-band epidemic; SCTLD spread (2014–present) and the 2023 marine heatwave have kept means in single digits.

jurisdictions.label: Puerto Rico (NCRMP)
jurisdictions.method: NCRMP biennial benthic transects across Puerto Rico shelf
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: NOAA NCRMP Puerto Rico benthic status report
jurisdictions.notes: Puerto Rico fore-reef means are higher than the Florida Keys but trending down through the SCTLD outbreak window.

jurisdictions.label: U.S. Virgin Islands (NCRMP)
jurisdictions.method: NCRMP biennial benthic transects, St. Thomas/St. John + St. Croix
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: NOAA NCRMP USVI benthic status report
jurisdictions.notes: Cover has declined since the SCTLD outbreak reached USVI in 2019.

jurisdictions.label: Flower Garden Banks (NCRMP / FGBNMS)
jurisdictions.method: Long-term photo-transect monitoring in the FGBNMS sanctuary
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: Flower Garden Banks NMS long-term monitoring program
jurisdictions.notes: FGBNMS is an unusual high-cover Atlantic reef — a useful counterpoint to typical Caribbean means.

jurisdictions.label: Main Hawaiian Islands (Pacific NCRMP)
jurisdictions.method: NCRMP Pacific stratified random benthic transects across MHI
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: NOAA Pacific NCRMP MHI status report
jurisdictions.notes: Main Hawaiian Islands mean cover has been relatively stable since the 2014–2015 bleaching event recovery window.

jurisdictions.label: Mesoamerican Reef — Mexico (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects across Quintana Roo (Cozumel, Cancun, Riviera Maya)
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: Healthy Reefs Initiative 2022 Mesoamerican Reef Report Card (AGRRA data)
jurisdictions.notes: AGRRA composite for Quintana Roo and adjacent Mexican Caribbean transects.

jurisdictions.label: Mesoamerican Reef — Belize (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects across Belize barrier reef + atolls
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: Healthy Reefs Initiative 2022 Mesoamerican Reef Report Card (AGRRA data)
jurisdictions.notes: Belize barrier reef + offshore atolls (Turneffe, Lighthouse, Glover's).

jurisdictions.label: Mesoamerican Reef — Honduras Bay Islands (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects across Roatán, Utila, Guanaja
jurisdictions.sourceLabel: Healthy Reefs Initiative 2022 Mesoamerican Reef Report Card (AGRRA data)
jurisdictions.notes: Bay Islands AGRRA composite (Roatán dominates the sample).

jurisdictions.label: Bonaire & Curaçao (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects along Bonaire + Curaçao leeward coasts
jurisdictions.notes: Among the highest mean cover in the Caribbean. Modest decline through the 2010s, but starting baseline is high.

jurisdictions.label: Cayman Islands (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects across Grand Cayman, Little Cayman, Cayman Brac
jurisdictions.notes: Little Cayman (Bloody Bay) historically among the highest cover in the region.

jurisdictions.label: The Bahamas (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects across multiple Bahamian banks
jurisdictions.notes: Wide variance across the Bahamian banks; the AGRRA composite trends down through the 2010s.

jurisdictions.label: Cuba — Jardines de la Reina (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects in Jardines de la Reina National Park
jurisdictions.notes: Jardines de la Reina is one of the best-protected reef systems in the Caribbean; cover is consistently high in the AGRRA record.

jurisdictions.label: Dominican Republic (AGRRA)
jurisdictions.method: AGRRA Caribbean benthic transects along DR north/south coasts
jurisdictions.notes: AGRRA composite for DR; Silver Bank itself is offshore and not on the AGRRA transect network — treated as the nearest jurisdiction-level snapshot.
